business_description.nature_of_business: Commercial real estate investment and property management — office, retail, and mixed-use properties across the Dallas-Fort Worth and Houston metropolitan areas

coverages_discussed.notes: Endorsement CP 04 05 10 12 effective 2026-03-15; covers loss in value of the undamaged portion of the building due to enforcement of ordinance or law requiring demolition of damaged property.

Endorsement CP 04 09 10 12 effective 2026-03-15; covers direct physical loss of or damage to Covered Property caused by or resulting from an Equipment Breakdown accident to a scheduled object, including mechanical, electrical, or pressure equipment.

Endorsement CP 04 17 10 12 effective 2026-03-15; covers direct physical loss of or damage to Covered Property caused by interruption of utility services, including water supply, communication supply, and power supply services.
